# Full AI Readiness Context - metechi.dev

- Unified score: 33/100 (Critical)
- GEO score: 35/100
- Agent-ready score: 30/100

## Site Pages Included
- [Metechi – Developer Portfolio](https://www.metechi.dev/): Metechi
- [CoachPad - Tactical Board App](https://www.metechi.dev/coachpad.html): CoachPad
- [Infinite Flux - Reflex Runner Game](https://www.metechi.dev/infinite-flux.html): Infinite Flux
- [Verve – Elite Dating & Premium Connections](https://www.metechi.dev/verve.html): Verve is an elite dating and connection platform focused on genuine compatibility, privacy, and premium networking.
- [SwiftQuote - Quotes & Invoices Made Easy](https://www.metechi.dev/swiftquote.html): SwiftQuote

## Quick Wins
- Unblock GPTBot in robots.txt.
- Create and deploy llms.txt at the domain root.
- Add Organization/WebSite JSON-LD with sameAs links.
- Add missing meta description on homepage.

## Implementation Notes
- Use deploy-ready files for direct deployment.
- Use merge-safe files when your site already has custom configs.
